title: Digital Insurgency
notes: Foundation layer hand-authored from the seed bible (world/characters/outline/voice/canon) + new influences.md. DO NOT run --from-scratch or --phase foundation: it would regenerate and overwrite the hand-authored foundation.
Prologue is front matter at chapters/ch_00.md (not in the 1..16 drafting loop). Numbered chapters = ch_01..ch_16.

ch_04 and ch_05 hold full v0 drafts imported from the seed. ch_00-03 and ch_06-16 are scaffolds (beats + format + equations + boss + influences); full v0 prose for 6-16 lives in the seed/original brief and can be bulk-imported on request.

Two run paths: (A) full rebuild -> `uv run python run_pipeline.py --phase drafting` (drafts ch_01..ch_16 fresh from the foundation; v0 preserved in git). (B) revise-in-place -> set chapters_drafted=16 and run `--phase revision`.
Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in .env. Get one at https://console.anthropic.com/settings/keys
